title: Distinguish Paintings
description: Unique item textures for vanilla paintings.
body:
# Invariable Paintings Assets  
This pack provides item models and textures for every vanilla painting variant.

This version of the pack uses the new Minecraft item model system, allowing you to detect painting variants.

## Why Did I Make This Pack?  
I created this pack because, when I first updated my game, I couldn't use CIT (Custom Item Textures) since it hadn't been updated yet. I tried to make it work, and although the option for item models with custom data like block states was available, painting variants didn't function properly. After waiting for the update, I finally made this version to take advantage of the new features.

**Original Pack:**  
[Invariable Paintings CIT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/invarpaint-cit)  
[Invariable Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/invariable-paintings)

**Full credit to the original pack's author; I just updated it to the new snapshot!**
